name: Hangzhou Jizhi Mechatronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Jizhi Mechatronic Co., Ltd. engages in the production and development of balance machine equipment in China. The company's products include electromechanical industry, auto parts, vertical, pump, and turbine balancing machines. Its products are used in automotive motors, household appliances, power tools, turbochargers, tire hubs, crankshafts, brake discs, clutches, flywheels, wind turbines, general motors, various types of fans, water pumps, impellers, blowers, petrochemicals, and turbo compressors. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
